2604.21327.title: Understanding and Mitigating Spurious Signal Amplification in Test-Time Reinforcement Learning for Math Reasoning
2604.21327.paper_summary: Test-time reinforcement learning (TTRL) always adapts models at inference time via pseudo-labeling, leaving it vulnerable to spurious optimization signals from label noise. Through an empirical study, we observe that responses with medium consistency form an ambiguity region and constitute the primary source of reward noise. Crucially, we find that such spurious signals can be even amplified through group-relative advantage estimation. Motivated by these findings, we propose a unified framework, Debiased and Denoised test-time Reinforcement Learning (DDRL), to mitigate spurious signals. Concretely, DDRL first applies a frequency-based sampling strategy to exclude ambiguous samples while maintaining a balanced set of positive and negative examples. It then adopts a debiased advantage estimation with fixed advantages, removing the bias introduced by group-relative policy optimization. Finally, DDRL incorporates a consensus-based off-policy refinement stage, which leverages the rejection-sampled dataset to enable efficient and stable model updates. Experiments on three large language models across multiple mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that DDRL consistently outperforms existing TTRL baselines. The code will soon be released at https://github.com/yuyongcan/DDRL.
2604.21327.paper_summary_zh: 測試時強化學習（TTRL）總是在推理時通過偽標籤來調整模型，使其容易受到標籤噪聲的虛假優化信號的影響。通過實證研究，我們觀察到具有中等一致性的反應形成了一個模糊區域，並構成了獎勵噪聲的主要來源。關鍵是，我們發現這些虛假信號甚至可以通過群體相對優勢估計進一步放大。受到這些發現的啟發，我們提出了一個統一框架，即去偏差和去噪的測試時強化學習（DDRL），以減輕虛假信號。具體而言，DDRL 首先應用基於頻率的抽樣策略，以排除模糊樣本，同時保持正負示例的平衡集。然後，它採用固定優勢的去偏差優勢估計，消除了群體相對政策優化引入的偏差。最後，DDRL 結合了一個基於共識的離線策略精煉階段，利用拒絕抽樣的數據集來實現高效和穩定的模型更新。在多個數學推理基準上對三個大型語言模型的實驗表明，DDRL 始終優於現有的 TTRL 基準。代碼將很快在 https://github.com/yuyongcan/DDRL 上發布。
2604.21327.author: Yongcan Yu et.al.
2604.21327.authors: Yongcan Yu, Lingxiao He, Jian Liang, Kuangpu Guo, Meng Wang, Qianlong Xie, Xingxing Wang, Ran He
